title: Kaleidoscope Tavern Vanilla Enhanced
description: This resource pack adds extensive detail to the "Kaleidoscope Tavern" mod, providing full PBR and normal map coverage for all of its items. Parallax effects have also been added to selected items.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6821e16ada02e2bf09b85bfafd2932ce987eea.png)
**Description**:This resourcepack adds extensive detail to the [Kaleidoscope Tavern](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscopetavern), providing full PBR and normal map coverage for all of its items. Parallax effects have also been added to selected items.Also tested and compatible with [Kaleidoscope Tavern Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscope-tavern-refabricated).

**Note**:This resourcepack requires shaders to be enabled. Based on initial testing, it performs well with "Eclipse Shader"​ and "iterationRP Shader", and it is necessary to set the shader's "Parallax Mode"​ to "Smooth".
